subject: Gotenks in Super Saiyan form — golden long spiky hair, muscular frame, in an explosive wide-armed energy release pose
description: A muscular figure with voluminous golden spiky hair stands with arms spread wide in an explosive energy release pose. The hair is large and wild — more voluminous than standard SSJ, consistent with Gotenks's distinctive silhouette as a fusion of two children in Super Saiyan form. Bright golden-white energy bursts outward in all directions around the figure. The face shows an open-mouthed expression of exhilaration or battle excitement. The pose and energy discharge suggest an energy attack being unleashed rather than a charging phase. The background is overwhelmed by the light and energy discharge.
foreground: Gotenks in Super Saiyan form with large voluminous golden hair, arms wide in energy blast release
background: Explosive golden-white energy discharge in all directions
